theorem: Sidon heights => E_+ <= 6 N^2 (PROVED, incidence-free; height decoupling + R-021, two arrangements)
verdict: Sidon-height latitude unions PROVED E_+ <= 6 N^2 (incidence-free), upgrading R-040 empirical to theorem for Sidon; non-Sidon residual is height-aware (2D concentric energy grows with L, so no bounded 2D reduction) = the R-033 circle-incidence frontier

claims.name: A1_sidon_decoupling_exact
claims.detail: Sidon L=6 N=80: #{a+b=c+d with mismatched height-pair} = 0 == 0 (height-pairing decouples)

claims.name: A3_arrangement_bound
claims.detail: Sidon L=5: E_+=11236 <= sum_(i,j)[E_+(C_i,C_j)+corr] = 13960 <= 6N^2=27744 (both arrangements; each term <= 3 nu_i nu_j)

claims.name: A4_nonsidon_residual
claims.detail: AP heights L=5: #{mismatched-height quadruples} = 1248 > 0 -- non-Sidon residual (height-aware; not captured by within-pair energies)

claims.name: A5_heights_essential_2D_grows
claims.detail: 2D concentric-circle energy E2/N^2 = 3.21, 3.90, 5.35, 6.00 GROWS with L -> the residual is height-AWARE (3D heights suppress what 2D overcounts); not a bounded 2D reduction

claims.name: A6_R033_consistency
claims.detail: all Sidon configs satisfy E_+ <= 3 N^{9/4} (R-033 record consistency)

claims.name: A7_sidon_radius_agnostic
claims.detail: EQUAL-radius (r=25) + Sidon heights L=6 N=120: mismatched=0==0, E_+=75240 <= 6N^2=86400 (E_+/N^2=5.22) -- the Sidon bound is RADIUS-AGNOSTIC (no distinct-radius needed)
